---
title: Validation
---

# Validation & Benchmarks

Comparisons of NumCosmo against the Core Cosmology Library (CCL), validating
agreement on key observables.

- [CCL Background](ccl_background.qmd) — background expansion and distances.
- [CCL Power Spectrum](ccl_power_spectrum.qmd) — linear and nonlinear matter power spectra.
- [CCL Two-Point Correlation](ccl_two_point.qmd) — angular two-point statistics.
